name: #One
description: #One is a secure communication software offering a range of features to simplify communications and boost productivity. #One combines video meetings and conferencing, chats and file sharing seamlessly into one, cyber secure software.
longDescription:
#One is a secure communication software offering a range of features to simplify communications and boost productivity. #One combines video meetings and conferencing, chats, instant messaging and file sharing seamlessly into one, cyber secure software. #One enables your teams and external partners to connect and collaborate effortlessly anywhere, anytime. The software caters to businesses, organisations, and individuals seeking a European GDPR-compliant communication platform to secure their communication.

#One enables your teams and external partners to connect and collaborate effortlessly anywhere, anytime. The software caters to businesses, organisations, and individuals seeking a European GDPR-compliant communication platform to secure their communication.

Key features of #One:

Online meetings and video conferences — Arrange and host secure online meetings and video conferences for real-time communication and collaboration with colleagues and external partners. Share presentations and important documents and use meeting chat for providing relevant information in written format.
Team chat and instant messaging — Chat with teams with rich group discussions to stay connected and updated on important topics. Connect with colleague via personal one-to-one instant messaging. Keep discussions organized with intuitive replies and chat history.
Rooms — Organise communication with teams and external stakeholders in #One Rooms, designed for streamlined collaboration. Rooms allow users to arrange online meetings, video calls, chats, and document sharing in one place per topic or team, helping teams and project members to stay aligned.
Benefits of using #One:is powered by

All-in-one communication software — #One eliminates the need to switch between multiple tools by integrating video meetings, video calls, chat, instant messaging, and file sharing into one central platform.
Enhanced collaboration with dedicated rooms — Supports virtual collaboration rooms for departments, projects, or client communication. Each room serves as a centralised hub for messaging, meetings, and document sharing keeping everyone aligned and informed.
Secure and private infrastructure — Hosted in Finland within the EU on Dream Broker's own server infrastructure, #One is built for organisations that take information security and privacy seriously. #One is audited by third-party experts in order to safeguard users' data.
